info.title: Caspio REST API
info.description: Caspio REST API provides endless possibilities to extend the power of Caspio by integrating your account with other applications and services. Swagger UI allows you to visualize and interact with Caspio REST API before you start customizing your applications. To try out these operations with your Caspio account, follow the instructions outlined in Caspio’s help article: Web Services API.

get.summary: Returns the list of available tables
Returns the description of the table

application/json.example:
{
  "Result": [
    {
      "Name": "string",
      "Type": "string",
      "Unique": true,
      "Editable": true,
      "Description": "string",
      "DisplayOrder": 0,
      "Label": "string",
      "UniqueAllowNulls": true,
      "IsFormula": true,
      "OnInsert": true,
      "OnUpdate": true,
      "TimeZone": "string",
      "Format": "string",
      "Prefix": "string",
      "Length": 0,
      "ListField": {
        "1": "string",
        "2": "string"
      },
      "AttachmentPermittedFileTypes": [
        "string",
        "string"
      ],
      "AttachmentMinFileSize": 0,
      "AttachmentMaxFileSize": 0,
      "AttachmentSmartResizer": true,
      "AttachmentSmartResizerForRetina": true,
      "AttachmentAltText": "string",
      "AttachmentTitle": "string"
    }
  ]
}

application/xml.example:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<GetTableFieldsResponse>
  <Result>
    <Name>string</Name>
    <Type>string</Type>
    <Unique>true</Unique>
    <Editable>true</Editable>
    <Description>string</Description>
    <DisplayOrder>0</DisplayOrder>
    <Label>string</Label>
    <UniqueAllowNulls>true</UniqueAllowNulls>
    <IsFormula>true</IsFormula>
    <OnInsert>true</OnInsert>
    <OnUpdate>true</OnUpdate>
    <TimeZone>string</TimeZone>
    <Format>string</Format>
    <Prefix>string</Prefix>
    <Length>0</Length>
    <ListField>
      <item Key="1" Value="string" />
      <item Key="2" Value="string" />
    </ListField>
    <AttachmentPermittedFileTypes>
      <FileType>string</FileType>
      <FileType>string</FileType>
    </AttachmentPermittedFileTypes>
    <AttachmentMinFileSize>0</AttachmentMinFileSize>
    <AttachmentMaxFileSize>0</AttachmentMaxFileSize>
    <AttachmentSmartResizer>true</AttachmentSmartResizer>
    <AttachmentSmartResizerForRetina>true</AttachmentSmartResizerForRetina>
    <AttachmentAltText>string</AttachmentAltText>
    <AttachmentTitle>string</AttachmentTitle>
  </Result>
</GetTableFieldsResponse>

put.summary: Updates the field definition in the table

delete.summary: Deletes the field from the table

parameters.name: q.select
parameters.description: List of fields separated by comma

parameters.name: q.limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records returned (skipped when q.pageNumber or q.pageSize is not empty, max = 1000, default = 100)

parameters.name: q.pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number (if q.pageSize is not empty then default = 1)

parameters.name: q.pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (possible values from 5 to 1000, if q.pageNumber is not empty then default = 25)

post.summary: Inserts a record into the table
post.description:
- If response is "rows", the inserted record is returned.
- If response is empty, only 201 Created is returned.

put.description:
- If response is "rows", the affected records and their count is returned.
- If response is empty, only the count of affected records is returned.

get.summary: Returns a list of the table password fields

put.summary: Updates the table password field value

delete.summary: Resets the table password field value

get.summary: Returns file content as an attachment from the table attachment field

put.summary: Uploads or overwrites one file in the table attachment field

delete.summary: Deletes a file from the table attachment field

put.summary: Updates a file name in the table attachment field
put.description:
- If response is "rows", the affected records and their count is returned.
- If response is empty, only the count of affected records is returned

parameters.name: q.select
parameters.description: List of fields separated by comma

parameters.name: q.limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records returned (skipped when q.pageNumber or q.pageSize is not empty, max = 1000, default = 100)

parameters.name: q.pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number (if q.pageSize is not empty then default = 1)

parameters.name: q.pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (possible values from 5 to 1000, if q.pageNumber is not empty then default = 25)

post.summary: Inserts a record into the view
post.description:
- If response is "rows", the inserted record is returned.
- If response is empty, only 201 Created is returned.

put.description:
- If response is "rows", the affected records and their count is returned.
- If response is empty, only the count of affected records is returned

get.summary: Returns file content as an attachment from the table attachment field

put.summary: Uploads or overwrites one file in the table attachment field

delete.summary: Deletes a file from the table attachment field

put.summary: Updates a file name in the table attachment field
put.description:
- If response is "rows", the affected records and their count is returned.
- If response is empty, only the count of affected records is returned

get.summary: Returns the list of folders in the specified parent folder
get.description:
- If **externalKey** is empty, the list of folders from the root folder is returned.
- If **externalKey** belongs to a folder, the list of folders from the specified folder is returned.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (possible values from 5 to 1000, default = 25)

parameters.name: sortDescending
parameters.description: Sort direction (set to true for descending order, default is false)

get.summary: Returns the list of files in the specified folder
get.description:
- If **externalKey** is empty, the list of files from the root folder is returned.
- If **externalKey** belongs to a folder, the list of files from the specified folder is returned.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (possible values from 5 to 1000, default = 25)

parameters.name: sortDescending
parameters.description: Sort direction (set to true for descending order, default is false)

post.summary: Uploads one or more files into the Files area
post.description:
- If externalKey is empty, the root folder is used as the destination.
- If a file with the same name as the uploaded file exists Conflict is returned.
- The ‘Content-Type’ HTTP-header of request must be ‘multipart/form-data’
- Name / contentType of each file is taken from part of ‘multipart/form-data’ content (‘filename’ parameter in ‘Content-Disposition’ / ‘Content-Type’ HTTP-headers)

put.summary: Uploads or overwrites one file into the Files area
put.description:
- If externalKey is empty it uploads to the root folder.
- If a file with the same name as the uploaded file exists it will overwrite it.
- The ‘Content-Type’ HTTP-header of request must be ‘multipart/form-data’
- Name / contentType of file is taken from part of ‘multipart/form-data’ content (‘filename’ parameter in ‘Content-Disposition’ / ‘Content-Type’ HTTP-headers)

get.summary: Returns a file content as an attachment
Returns a file content as an attachment
Returns the list of available outgoing webhooks

post.description:
- **Name** is required and must be unique for each outgoing webhook.
- **Description** is optional. 
- **OutgoingUrls** is required, must be unique for each outgoing webhook, and should be a valid HTTPS address. If the account plan has access to multicast webhooks, more than one can be added.
- **CallThrottling** is optional and should be higher than 0 and lower than the max value for the account plan. If not provided, the account plan's max value is used.

get.description: - **Messages**, **Calls**, and **Errors** are webhook activities from the last 30 days.

put.description:
At least one of the following parameters must be included in the request body:
- **Name** must be unique for each outgoing webhook.
- **Description**
- **OutgoingUrls** must be unique for each outgoing webhook, and should be a valid HTTPS address. If the account plan has access to multicast webhooks, more than one can be added.
- **CallThrottling** should be higher than 0 and lower than the max value for the account plan.
- **Enabled** can be set to true or false to configure statuses of all events related to this webhook.

delete.summary: Deletes the outgoing webhook and its events

get.summary: Returns the events defined in the outgoing webhook

post.summary: Creates a new event in the outgoing webhook
post.description:
- **EventType** is required and valid values are: *table.recordInsert*, *table.recordUpdate*, *table.recordDelete*. 
- **ObjectName** is required and must be a table name.  
- **ObjectFields** is optional, applies only to *table.recordUpdate*, and must be an array of table field names. If not provided, the webhook is triggered on changes to any table fields.
- **EventSources** is optional and valid values are: *Datasheet*, *DataPages*, *RESTAPIs*, *TriggeredActions*, *Tasks*. If not provided or empty, it defaults to all values.
- **CustomPayloadFields** is optional and must be an array of table field names. 
- **CustomPayloadTemplate** is optional, must be a string value and use single quotes instead of escaped double quotes in JSON.
- **Enabled** is optional and can be set to true or false to configure the event **Status** (*Active* or *Inactive*). If not provided, it defaults to true (*Active*).

get.description: - **Messages**, **Calls**, and **Errors** are event activities from the last 30 days.

put.description:
- **EventType** is required and valid values are: *table.recordInsert*, *table.recordUpdate*, *table.recordDelete*. 
- **ObjectName** is required and must be a table name.  
- **ObjectFields** is optional, applies only to *table.recordUpdate*, and must be an array of table field names. If not provided, the webhook is triggered on changes to any table fields.
- **EventSources** is optional and valid values are: *Datasheet*, *DataPages*, *RESTAPIs*, *TriggeredActions*, *Tasks*. If not provided or empty, it defaults to all values.
- **CustomPayloadFields** is optional and must be an array of table field names. 
- **CustomPayloadTemplate** is optional, must be a string value and use single quotes instead of escaped double quotes in JSON.
- **Enabled** is optional and can be set to true or false to configure the event **Status** (*Active* or *Inactive*). If not provided, it defaults to true (*Active*).

delete.summary: Deletes the event from the outgoing webhook

get.summary: Returns the list of scheduled tasks

get.description:
Available deployment methods: **iFrame**, **URL**, **Embedded**, **Net**.  
Values are case-insensitive and can be replaced by a single character of each string (**I**, **U**, **E**, **N**) respectively.

put.summary: Deploys/Un-deploys all DataPages in the app

get.summary: Returns a list of users in the specified directory
get.description:
In addition to the directory table fields, the following user attributes are returned:
- **_status** – a string that indicates the user’s status:
	- "Active"
	- "Inactive"
	- "ActivationPending"
	- "ActivationExpired"
	- "Locked"
	- "Suspended"
	- "PasswordExpired"
- **_sign_in_method** – a string that indicates the user's method of signing in (for example, "Caspio" or an external SAML identity provider).
- **_2fa_status** – a string that indicates the two‑factor authentication state:
	- "Enabled" when the user's 2FA is configured
	- "Disabled" when the user's 2FA is not configured
	- "Unavailable" when 2FA is turned off for the directory 

These attributes are available in q.select, q.where, q.groupBy, and q.orderBy.

parameters.name: q.select
parameters.description: List of fields separated by comma

parameters.name: q.limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records returned (skipped when q.pageNumber or q.pageSize is not empty, max = 1000, default = 100)

parameters.name: q.pageNumber
parameters.description: Page number (if q.pageSize is not empty then default = 1)

parameters.name: q.pageSize
parameters.description: Number of records per page (possible values from 5 to 1000, if q.pageNumber is not empty then default = 25)

post.summary: Creates a user in the specified directory

parameters.name: response
parameters.description: If the Response is set to "rows", a newly created record is returned. If the Response is empty, only the 201 Created status is returned.

requestBody.description: Values of a new user record

put.summary: Updates users in the specified directory

parameters.name: Where
parameters.description: WHERE clause. The following user attributes are not supported: _status, _sign_in_method, _2fa_status.

parameters.name: response
parameters.description: If the Response is set to "rows", a newly created record is returned. If the Response is empty, only the 201 Created status is returned.

requestBody.description: New values of the user records

delete.summary: Deletes users from the specified directory

parameters.name: Where
parameters.description: WHERE clause. The following user attributes are not supported: _status, _sign_in_method, _2fa_status.

requestBody.description:
- **UserGUID** is required. It must be the value from the UserGUID field of the directory table that uniquely identifies the user.
- **SendEmail** is optional. The valid values are:
	- true (default) - the built-in activation email (using your directory’s template) is sent to the user.
	- false - no email is sent and the returned ActivationUrl must be used to build and send a custom activation email.

DataPagesCount.description: Number of DataPages in the app

DefaultIcon.description: Indicates whether the default icon is used for the app (possible values = {true, false})

IconFileName.description: Custom icon file name if one is used

Unique.description: Indicates whether the field value must be unique

Editable.description: Indicates whether the field value is editable

UniqueAllowNulls.description: Indicates whether the null value is allowed in the unique field

IsFormula.description: Indicates whether the field is the formula field

ModifiedBy.description: User who made the last change to this DataPage

Unique.description: Indicates whether the field value must be unique (possible values = {true, false}, default value = false)

UniqueAllowNulls.description: Indicates whether the null value is allowed in the unique field (use only if Unique = true, possible values = {true, false}, default value = false)

DisplayOrder.description: Display order (default value = 0 which means last)

OnInsert.description: Used only for TIMESTAMP field type. Indicates whether the date and time will be recorded when record is submitted (possible values = {true, false}, default value = false)

OnUpdate.description: Used only for TIMESTAMP field type. Indicates whether the date and time will be recorded when record is updated (possible values = {true, false}, default value = false)

TimeZone.description: Used only for TIMESTAMP field type. Indicates the time zone used to record date and time (default value = "")

Format.description: Field format which is used only for RANDOM ID (possible values {"0", "U", "0U"}) and PREFIXED AUTONUMBER (possible values {"1", "01", "001", "0001", "00001", "000001", "0000001"}) field type (default value = "")

Prefix.description: Prefix of the field value which is used only for RANDOM ID and PREFIXED AUTONUMBER field type (string length must be less than 50, default value = "")

Length.description: Length of the random part value which is used only for RANDOM ID field type (if Format = "0" then Length must be from 8 to 12, if Format = {"U", "0U"} then Length must be from 6 to 12, default value = 12)

IsFormula.description: Indicates whether the field is the formula field (possible values = {true, false}, default value = false)

ListField.description: List of values which is used only for LIST-STRING, LIST-NUMBER, LIST-DATE/TIME (example: ["value1", "value2", "value3"])

AttachmentPermittedFileTypes.description: List of values (permitted file extensions) which is used only for ATTACHMENT field type (if null or empty all file types are allowed)

AttachmentMinFileSize.description: Minimum file size which is used only for ATTACHMENT field type

AttachmentMaxFileSize.description: Maximum file size which is used only for ATTACHMENT field type

AttachmentSmartResizer.description: Smart resizer option which is used only for ATTACHMENT field type

AttachmentSmartResizerForRetina.description: Optimize for Retina displays option which is used only for ATTACHMENT field type (only if AttachmentSmartResizer = true)

AttachmentAltText.description: Alt text which is used only for ATTACHMENT field type

AttachmentTitle.description: Title which is used only for ATTACHMENT field type

Status.description: Task status (possible values = {"Busy" - analysis before starting, "Processing" - task runs, "Ready" - ready to run})

TaskTimeZone.description: Task time zone in which it is started

Frequency.description: Task frequency (possible values = {"Once", "On demand", "Every X hours", "Every day", "Every X days", "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday", "Sunday", "X of the month", "First/Second/Third/Fourth/Last <day of the week> of the month"})

UniqueAllowNulls.description: Indicates whether the null value is allowed in the unique field (use only if Unique = true, possible values = {true, false})

Prefix.description: Prefix of the field value which is used only for RANDOM ID and PREFIXED AUTONUMBER field type (string length must be less than 50)

Length.description: Length of the random part value which is used only for RANDOM ID field type (if Format = "0" then Length must be from 8 to 12, if Format = {"U", "0U"} then Length must be from 6 to 12)
